title: Syllogistic/Deductive Logic Task Family with Parameterized Premise-Count Difficulty
summary: Demo notebook that generates a 280-problem syllogistic deductive logic dataset with difficulty parameterized by premise count (d=2 to d=15). Uses Z3 SMT solver for formal verification of ground truth, randomized entity names from 8 semantic categories, and 4 chain templates (A/B/C/D). The notebook loads a 48-example curated subset from GitHub for comparison, generates all 280 problems with Z3 verification in ~1s, validates TRUE/FALSE balance and template distribution, evaluates a keyword heuristic baseline, and produces visualizations of accuracy vs difficulty, chain reconstruction complexity, and problem distribution.
